final:
module clock_gating (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d; // update the flip-flop output with input d
        end
        // else q retains its value
    end
endmodule
